packages.name: cs2
packages.title: Counter-Strike 2 server
packages.description: CS2 dedicated server: the game installation (~60 GB, downloaded by the image via SteamCMD) lives in the instance's private volume

packages.name: 7dtd
packages.title: 7 Days to Die server
packages.description: 7 Days to Die dedicated server; the game installation is downloaded on first start into the instance's private volumes

packages.name: gta5
packages.title: GTA 5 server (FiveM)
packages.description: FiveM dedicated server for GTA V multiplayer, managed through its bundled txAdmin web console
